name: Whitsunday Pearl
description: Escape into paradise aboard the sleek and stylish catamaran, Whitsunday Pearl. This luxurious vessel offers an intimate experience with accommodations for just 8 guests in four private double cabins, each with an ensuite. Perfect for couples and small groups seeking a unique adventure, this tour combines relaxation with exploration. Enjoy snorkeling in pristine reefs, visiting the iconic Whitehaven Beach, and indulging in water sports. With spacious decks, a coffee machine, and Starlink Wifi, you'll have everything you need for a comfortable journey.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina Meeting Point C
includes:
Accommodation in private double cabins with ensuites
Visit to Whitehaven Beach
Snorkeling in pristine reefs
Water sports
Spacious decks
Coffee machine
Starlink Wifi

locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hamilton Island,Hill Inlet,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island

important_information: ['Whitsunday Pearl is suitable for adults only, so the minimum age is 18 years old.', 'A passenger is only able to participate in water activities if they have a level of swimming experience.', 'In order to meet our minimum safety standards, passengers must be able to exit the vessel unassisted in the unlikely case of an emergency.']
what_to_bring: ['Change of clothes', 'Swimwear', 'Toiletries', 'Insect repellent', 'Water bottle to refill', 'Camera', 'Comfortable walking shoes', 'Sun protection (sunscreen, hat, sunnies etc.)', 'Warm clothes/pullover for evenings (seasonal)', 'Your own set of fins if you have them']
whats_extra: ['BYO alcohol - no glass bottles (with the exception of wine bottles).', 'A $15 per day surcharge may apply for some dietary requests and requirements.', 'Peak holiday seasons (i.e. Christmas, Easter, New Years) may incur a surcharge.', 'You can store any extra bags at our Airlie Beach Bag Storage located on the main street, for a small fee.']
cancellation_policy: ['No shows or client cancellations made within 30 days of departure forfeit 100% of the total ticket price.', 'Cancellations made between 30-60 days before departure will incur a 25% cancellation fee.']
